title: BattleAxes
description: BattleAxes is now-abandoned Minecraft mod. Which adds unique blocks, items, armor and weapons to the game.
body:
This mod is special, you can go out and explore the new stuff in this mod.
You can also travel to the Moon.

(Please note that some versions requires the BattleAxes API or a different mod.)

*New ores have appeared in different parts of your Minecraft world!
- Custom (Ruby, Titanium, Beryl, etc.)

Classic biomes!

New blocks!
- New wood-types + fences, planks, slabs, fence gates, etc.
- Moon blocks
- *Ores & more!

and.. New weapons and tools!
- Overworld variants
- Custom variants (Ruby, Titanium, Beryl, etc.)
- Battle axes (Use them as axes and weapons! Chop down wood and fight mobs!)


This mod has been made in MCreator. (MCreator is a free Minecraft Mod Making software, where you can make Plug-ins, Mods (for Forge & Fabric), Datapacks & more!)
https://mcreator.net/

If you have any issues with the mod, make sure to contact me via Twitter or Discord for support:
- Twitter - https://twitter.com/1H_StudiosOffi or https://twitter.com/1HourOSTs_Offi
- Discord - Username: 1hourosts_offi / Display name: OneHourOST's
